title: Data Updated — 26 June 2026, 20:59
body: Candidate records, preferences, certificates, and profile statuses refreshed with the latest portal data. Merit calculations and seat allocation now reflect the current snapshot.

title: Bug Fixes
body: Accepted count now correctly includes amendment-accepted candidates. Preference marks no longer show 0.00 — certificate-matched marks are used with policy fallbacks. Speciality names display properly instead of raw IDs.

title: UI Refresh
body: Animated quote strip with clickable dots, smoother notification banners with gradient backgrounds, and polished toast messages with status-colored indicators.
